mnemonics.title: Point Operation Types
mnemonics.content: Never Buy Cheap Tomatoes Gracefully - Negation, Brightness, Contrast, Thresholding, Gamma correction

mnemonics.title: Gamma Values
mnemonics.content: Low Gamma Lights Dark Areas (γ < 1 expands dark values), High Gamma Highlights Bright Areas (γ > 1 expands bright values)

mnemonics.title: Bit Plane Importance
mnemonics.content: High Bits Hold Important Information (bits 7-5 are most significant), Low Bits Lack Importance (bits 0-2 are least significant)

mnemonics.title: Histogram Characteristics
mnemonics.content: Bright Images Bend Right (histogram skewed to high values), Dark Images Drift Left (histogram skewed to low values)
